section.title: tool
section.para: Identifies the name of the localization tool used to create or modify the content described by a <change>.
section.programlisting: <unit id="1"> <pvn:provenance> <pvn:change person="Anxela Loureiro" tool="Swordfish" appliesTo="target"/> </pvn:provenance> <segment id="s1"> <source>Your annual tax certificate is now available for download.</source> <target>O seu certificado anual de impostos está dispoñible para descarga.</target> </segment> </unit>
